query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as comRating,
  MAX(dataReferencia) as ultimaData,
  MIN(dataReferencia) as primeiraData
FROM spread_analysis;

SELECT DISTINCT dataReferencia, COUNT(*) as qtd 
FROM spread_analysis 
GROUP BY dataReferencia 
ORDER BY dataReferencia DESC 
LIMIT 5;
